statement.en: A lectin-based magnetic CRISPR screening protocol permits rapid discovery of genes regulating cell-surface glycosylation
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document is a recent thesis (2026) under embargo with abstract withheld. The claimed method (lectin-based magnetic CRISPR screening) is theoretically sound but unvalidated in public literature. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional/pre-validation status typical of newly submitted research.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 糖鎖の環上で、レクチンと遺伝子編集の干渉が共鳴する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心の紫色の遺伝子編集が、虹色の糖鎖放射線を磁気で引き寄せて照らす。
